case_title: NOBLE ADAM B. VS OGDEN STEVEN REED

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT OGDEN STEVEN REED IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT NOBLE ADAM B. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY OGDEN STEVEN REED AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT NOBLE ADAM B. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-26-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NOBLE ADAM B. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OGDEN STEVEN REED $1,880.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,888.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,880.23 FILED BY NOBLE ADAM B. AS TO DEFENDANT OGDEN STEVEN REED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-11-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 00
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF NOBLE ADAM B.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OGDEN STEVEN REED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-11-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-26-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT OGDEN STEVEN REED
